message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Amtliche Schulstatistik Hessen – Volks-, Grund- und Hauptschulen, Schüler nach Altersjahren und Geschlecht 1966","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8228","justification":"Official school statistics for Hesse including age and sex of pupils in Volks-, primary and lower secondary schools around the mid‑1960s; directly relevant to compulsory education and children in Hesse."},{"title":"Amtliche Schulstatistik Hessen – Kindergärten und Vorklassen 1966","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8230","justification":"Hessian official statistics on kindergartens and preschool classes around 1966; specifically covers pre‑school education institutions for children in Hesse in the 1960s."},{"title":"Amtliche Schulstatistik Hessen – Schüler an Grund- und Hauptschulen nach Jahrgangsstufen 1964","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8225","justification":"Covers distribution of pupils by grade in primary and lower secondary schools in Hesse in 1964, providing detail on compulsory‑school‑age children during the 1960s."},{"title":"Amtliche Schulstatistik Hessen – Schüler an Grund- und Hauptschulen nach Jahrgangsstufen 1962","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8223","justification":"Earlier‑1960s Hessian school statistics; allows analysis of compulsory education structures and numbers of children by grade in Hesse at the start of the decade."},{"title":"Bildung in Hessen 1960–1970: Statistische Übersichten zum Schulwesen","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8235","justification":"Compiled statistical overviews of the school system in Hesse across the 1960–1970 period; useful for contextualizing compulsory schooling and enrollment of children over the whole decade."},{"title":"Statistik der Schüler an Volks- und Grundschulen in Hessen 1960","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8220","justification":"Hessian statistics at the very start of the 1960s on pupils in primary/Volks schools, directly related to compulsory education of children in Hesse."},{"title":"Statistik der Kindergärten in Hessen 1962","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8231","justification":"Focuses on kindergarten institutions and enrolled children in Hesse in 1962; relevant to pre‑school education coverage during the early 1960s."},{"title":"Statistik der Schüler nach Schularten in Hessen 1968","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8229","justification":"Gives breakdown of pupils by school type in Hesse in the late 1960s, including primary and lower‑secondary levels that belong to compulsory education for children."},{"title":"Schulstatistik Hessen – Entwicklung der Schülerzahlen 1960–1969","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8240","justification":"Time‑series dataset on the evolution of pupil numbers in Hesse across the entire 1960s; enables analysis of trends in compulsory schooling participation among children."},{"title":"Statistische Berichte Hessen: Vorschulerziehung und Schule 1965","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8232","justification":"Combined statistical reporting on preschool (Vorschulerziehung) and schools in Hesse around 1965, directly spanning both compulsory and pre‑school education for children in the mid‑1960s."}]}
